layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid. High density, 1px structural borders, optical alignment.
layout_and_spacing.page_container: px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8 w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto

sidebar.base: fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 w-64 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 transition-transform duration-300
sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors
sidebar.item_active: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 relative before:absolute before:inset-y-0 before:-left-3 before:w-1 before:bg-blue-600 before:rounded-r-md

navbar.base: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-4 sm:px-6

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm transition-all

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent transition-shadow

tables.container: w-full overflow-auto rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white
tables.header: bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium

empty_state.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center border-2 border-dashed border-slate-200 rounded-lg bg-slate-50
empty_state.title: text-sm font-medium text-slate-900 mb-1

modules_guidelines.dashboard: Use a 12-column bento grid. Top row: 4 Metric cards (col-span-3 each). Middle row: Main Recharts LineChart for trends (col-span-8), Recent Activity feed (col-span-4).
modules_guidelines.attendance: Prominent Clock-in/out widget at the top with current time and status. Monthly calendar below using standard HTML grid (7 cols) with color-coded square indicators (Green=Present, Red=Absent).
modules_guidelines.leave_management: Split layout. Left: Leave application form (sticky). Right: Leave balance cards (Sick, Casual, Annual) and History table.
modules_guidelines.payroll: List view of payslips. Detail view shows a structured 'Receipt' style layout. Earnings on left, Deductions on right. Total bolded at bottom.
modules_guidelines.performance: Score charts using Recharts Radar or Bar charts. Goal progress bars using simple HTML/Tailwind width percentages.
modules_guidelines.recruitment: Kanban board. Flex container with overflow-x-auto. Columns for Applied, Screening, Interview, Offered. Draggable cards with candidate info.
modules_guidelines.notifications: Bell icon in Navbar with red ping dot. Dropdown panel with max-height and overflow-y-auto. Unread items have blue left border.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle y-axis lift for cards (-translate-y-0.5) with shadow increase.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use Lucide 'Loader2' icon with 'animate-spin' for inline loading. For page loads, use a centered spinner or skeleton loaders.
motion_and_interaction.toast: Use Sonner. Position: bottom-right. Success: Emerald icon. Error: Red icon.
motion_and_interaction.modals: Backdrop blur on overlay (backdrop-blur-sm bg-slate-900/20). Slide in from bottom slightly (animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-4).

avatars.description: Professional male headshot for employee profile
Professional female headshot for employee profile

backgrounds.description: Minimalist desk for soft empty state visual touch

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
Use Shadcn UI for standard components: Button, Input, Table, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Avatar, Badge, Form.
Ensure all routing reflects the 4 roles: management_admin, senior_manager, hr_recruiter, employee.
For the Kanban board, implement HTML5 Drag and Drop or a simple library like @hello-pangea/dnd.
CRITICAL: Always apply `data-testid` to buttons, inputs, and major layout sections.
Mobile Responsiveness: Hide sidebar text on md screens, completely off-canvas on sm screens (use hamburger menu).
Add client-side validation using Zod for all forms (Leave Application, Login, Employee Edit, Job Posting).
